title: Shopify Developer- Lead

description:
About the job
We are seeking a super senior, certified, highly technical Shopify Developer who can architect, build, and optimise enterprise-grade Shopify Plus/Headless solutions. This is not a theme-tweaking role. 

Architect scalable Shopify solutions across themes, custom apps, integrations, and Shopify Functions.
Lead and mentor developers, owning code quality, standards, and technical direction.
Build custom themes using Liquid, JSON templates, and modern front-end practices.
Develop custom Shopify apps (Node/React/Ruby) and implement complex business logic.
Own API and integration workflows, including Admin API, Storefront API, GraphQL, and webhooks.
Optimise performance across storefront speed, SEO, accessibility, and Lighthouse metrics.
Conduct code reviews & ensure technical rigor across all builds.
Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues, platform limitations, and integration failures.
Collaborate with PMs and designers to estimate, plan sprints, and deliver high-quality releases on time.
Advise clients and teams on best practices, technical constraints, and optimal platform solutions.

Technical Skills
5–8+ years in Shopify development, with at least 3+ years at a senior or lead level.
Expert-level Liquid and deep understanding of Shopify’s rendering model
Shopify Functions
Theme architecture & modular component patterns
Checkout extensibility
JavaScript/TypeScript
Modern frameworks (React preferred)
Solid experience with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment workflows.
Multi-store, multi-region, internationalisation
3rd-party integrations (ERP, OMS, WMS, CRM, subscriptions, loyalty)
Checkout extensibility
Shopify app ecosystem and partner platforms
Shopify Plus expertise: multi-store, markets, multi-region, internationalisation.
Strong understanding of the app ecosystem and when each app is (or isn’t) appropriate.
Experience working with security, compliance, and large-scale data migrations.

About Us:
Miroma Project Factory (MPF) is a global award-winning digital development company providing creative digital products across web, mobile, social media, interactive TV, virtual worlds, and games platforms. Founded in 2005, the company produces interactive solutions focused especially on behaviour change and gamification to positively influence our communities.

Successful Digital Development Agency with a global reach 
Full-time, contract role 12 months
Full-time hybrid role (3 days in office, Redfern, 2 days wfh)
Reporting to Technical Lead
